residence.place.actual: Well, we lived in Germany for a while when the boys were small — that's where Vincent was born. Then we moved around quite a bit. North Dakota of course, and other places.

military.branch.actual: My great-grandfather John Michael Shong served in the Civil War. Company G of the 28th Infantry, from February 1865 to January 1866. He was stationed in Kansas and Missouri.

health.majorCondition.actual: When I got older my knees gave out from all those years of construction. Concrete and roofing — that's hard on the body. I had to slow down a lot in my seventies.
